chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3709 of 2019 CP D 1080 of 2019 CP D 3831 of 2019 CP D 4323 of 2019 CP D 8024 of 2019 CP D 7001 of 2022 CP D 7002 of 2022 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) 1. For hearing of CMA No.16668/2019 (stay). 2. For hearing of main case. 23-05-2025 Mr. Arshad Hussain, advocate for petitioners Mr. Qazi Umair Ali, advocate for petitioners Mr. Ameer Bakhsh Metlo, advocate for respondent Mr. Qaim Ali Memon, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Deputy Attorney General along with Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Umair Khalil, D.C.I.R CTO, Karachi (FBR). Mr. Umair Khalil, D.C.I.R CTO, Karachi (FBR) has filed reply to show cause notice which is taken on record. Paragraph-1 of the reply reads as follows:- In compliance with the order dated 27.01.2024 it is submitted that the controversy is covered by judgment of Hon’ble Lahore High Court dated 14.05.2019 is writ petition number 257828 of 2018. The said judgment has attained finality and has not been challenged before any higher legal for a. In this regard, the instructions by the FBR is to uphold the judgments of the Hon’ble High Court and the instant matter is may be decided on the merits of the case and the wisdom of the Hon’ble High Court. In view of the foregoing it is submitted that the present petitions may be disposed of upon the same reasoning and on the same terms as the judgment referred to supra. Order accordingly. The notice issued to the officer is discharged. The presence and assistance rendered is appreciated and dispensed with. Office is directed to place a copy hereof in each connected petition.
The presence and assistance rendered is appreciated and dispensed with. Office is directed to place a copy hereof in each connected petition. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
